name: implement_a_python_http_api_with_reminder_endpoint
description: Implement a Python HTTP API with endpoints: create-reminder (POST), list-reminders (GET), delete-reminder (POST), and check-status (GET). Data fields: title (str), time (str), message (str), type (str). Persist reminders to src/data/ as JSON files. Background service will trigger notifications based on stored time data.
examples: Implement a Python HTTP API with endpoints: create-reminder (POST), list-reminders (GET), delete-reminder (POST), and check-status (GET). Data fields: title (str), time (str), message (str), type (str). Persist reminders to src/data/ as JSON files. Background service will trigger notifications based on stored time data.
